constraints: Used assigned isolated URLs only (localhost:4001 and localhost:3201)
Avoided destructive filesystem mutations per task instructions

assertions.title: Error state — UI displays error when .bropilot directory is missing

steps.action: Check current project initialization and attempt domain start from /domain/
steps.expected: UI should show missing-.bropilot initialization error
steps.observed: Isolated API project is initialized (/api/project -> 200) and Start transitioned to Step 3 prompt (no missing-.bropilot error).

assertions.issues: Blocked: reproducing missing-.bropilot precondition requires destructive mutation/removal of .bropilot in isolated API cwd, which was explicitly disallowed.

assertions.title: Error state — UI displays error when extracting before starting

steps.action: On /domain/ before start, trigger submitInput path with non-empty text
steps.observed: UI displayed: 'Domain worker not started. Please restart the session.' and remained stable.

evidence.network: POST /api/domain/input -> 400 {"error":"domain worker not started — call POST /api/domain/start first"}

assertions.title: Navigation back to solution page shows extracted data

steps.action: Complete Act 2 in isolated environment (Step3 then Step4), then navigate to /solution/
steps.expected: Solution page shows extracted domain model and populated spec tabs
steps.observed: Domain data sections (vocabulary/entities/flows) were populated and all 11 spec tabs displayed populated indicators/content.

evidence.network: POST /api/domain/start (mock pre-start) -> 200; POST /api/domain/input -> 200; POST /api/domain/extract (step3) -> 200; POST /api/domain/extract (step4) -> 200; GET /solution/ -> 200

steps.observed: scrollWidth==clientWidth (375), no horizontal overflow, textarea and submit button visible and interactive.

assertions.title: Malformed LLM output returns error without advancing state

steps.action: Attempt extraction in LLM mode on /domain/ and check state-verification endpoint
steps.expected: Malformed-output error path exercised and worker confirmed pre-step3_done
steps.observed: Extraction attempts returned rate-limit error (`Extraction failed. :rate_limited`), and `/api/domain/status` is not available (404), so malformed-output state-transition contract could not be verified.

evidence.network: POST /api/domain/extract (via UI flow) -> extraction error :rate_limited; GET /api/domain/status -> 404

assertions.issues: Blocked by infrastructure/surface limitations: could not deterministically force malformed LLM payload, and required status endpoint for non-advancement verification is unavailable.

assertions.title: All sidebar pages load without error

steps.action: Navigate all required routes on isolated web URL and capture each page
steps.expected: All listed pages return 200 and render without JS errors
steps.observed: Core pages and /domain/ returned 200 with clean console; /traceability/ and /er/ returned 404 Not Found.

assertions.issues: Required new pages were not all available on the isolated web instance (/traceability and /er missing).

assertions.title: Sidebar highlights active page

steps.action: Navigate each sidebar page and inspect `.sidebar-link.active` count
steps.expected: Exactly one active sidebar link on every page
steps.observed: Active count was 1 on dashboard/problem/solution/work/knowledge/vibe/build/domain, but 0 on /connect/.

evidence.network: DOM checks per page: connect activeCount=0; all others tested activeCount=1

assertions.issues: Connect page does not apply active sidebar state.

assertions.title: Partial pipeline — Solution page shows available data only

steps.action: Create Step3-only state (without running Step4 in current flow) and navigate to /solution/
steps.expected: Domain model shown, specs indicated as pending/not yet generated
steps.observed: Solution page showed domain model data but also showed populated spec tabs/content instead of pending-specs state.

evidence.network: Step3-only run succeeded (POST /api/domain/extract step3 -> 200), then GET /solution/ -> 200 with populated spec sections

assertions.issues: Expected partial-state pending-spec UX was not present; spec sections appeared populated.

assertions.title: ER diagram with partial domain data

steps.action: Create Step3-only state and navigate to ER page
steps.expected: ER diagram renders Step3 entities even when Step4 specs are missing
steps.observed: Step3 domain data existed on /domain/, but /er/ route returned 404 and no ER diagram rendered.

assertions.issues: ER route unavailable on isolated web instance for this run.

frictions.description: Domain UI has no user-surface toggle for extraction mode; deterministic Act2 checks required pre-starting the worker in mock mode via API.
frictions.resolution: Used `POST /api/domain/start` with `{"mode":"mock"}` before UI extraction assertions.

frictions.description: Missing-.bropilot assertion precondition requires removing/renaming .bropilot in API cwd.
frictions.resolution: Did not perform destructive filesystem mutation per assignment constraints; marked assertion blocked.

frictions.description: Malformed-output assertion depends on forcing malformed LLM output and checking `/api/domain/status`, but test run hit rate limits and status endpoint is unavailable.
frictions.resolution: Recorded rate-limit behavior and endpoint absence; marked assertion blocked.

blockers.description: Cannot safely induce missing-.bropilot state without destructive mutation in isolated API working directory.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked current initialization state and domain start behavior via UI/API; precondition remained unavailable without forbidden mutation.

blockers.description: Could not deterministically exercise malformed-LLM-output path; extraction attempts returned provider rate limits and `/api/domain/status` returned 404.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried extraction through UI and checked status endpoint availability; still unable to satisfy contract evidence path.

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 3 passed, 4 failed, 2 blocked. PASS: VAL-ACT2-018, VAL-ACT2-023, VAL-ACT2-024. FAIL: VAL-CROSS-060, VAL-CROSS-061, VAL-CROSS-080, VAL-CROSS-081. BLOCKED: VAL-ACT2-017, VAL-ACT2-027.
